title: ToolTreaux Eye Glasses Repair Kit Assorted Replacement Micro Screws 250 Pieces
description:
The ToolTreaux 250pc eyeglass repair kit comes with an assortment of micro screws and replacement parts that will allow you to fix your reading glasses or sunglasses on the go. Each kit comes with micro-screws that will fit just about any eyeglass frame, and all of the pieces fit neatly inside of a compact plastic storage container. The replacement screws are made of durable, high-quality metal so you can count on them to last for years to come. The storage tube is made of red plastic and comes with a transparent lid to keep the pieces stored safely during transit. Store it in your backpack, purse, or car to ensure you can repair your glasses as needed

ToolTreaux Eye Glasses Repair Kit Assorted Replacement Micro Screws 250 Pieces

The ToolTreaux 250pc eyeglass repair kit comes with an assortment of micro screws and replacement parts that will allow you to fix your reading glasses or sunglasses on the go. Each kit comes with micro-screws that will fit just about any eyeglass frame, and all of the pieces fit neatly inside of a compact plastic storage container.

Key Features

  • 250 ASSORTED REPAIR SCREWS - The ToolTreaux eyeglass and watch repair kit comes with 250 assorted micro-screws and replacement parts designed to fix eyeglasses, sunglasses, and watches on the go.
  • VERSATILE SCREW SET - Included in the kit are both optical micro-screws for eyeglasses, winding watch screws, and quartz watch screws. Save money on expensive repair shop trips by fixing your eyeglass frames and watches on your own.
  • COMPACT STORAGE CASE - All of the replacement screws fit neatly inside the included hard plastic swivel container. The container has 12 marked slots to keep the different sizes of screws organized and easy to identify.
  • UNIVERSAL REPLACEMENT PARTS - The set features 250 different common screws that will repair the most common eyeglasses and watches. Just make sure to keep a precision screwdriver on hand and you’ll be repairing your glasses and watches in no time.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: plastic, metal; Colors; red, clear; Size: 250 pieces; Optical and watch repair screws; Dimensions of storage case: 3” x 3”; Weight: .1lbs (1.6oz)

Product Specifications

  • MPN: REPSCW-250
  • UPC: 810058481429

The replacement screws are made of durable, high-quality metal so you can count on them to last for years to come. The storage tube is made of red plastic and comes with a transparent lid to keep the pieces stored safely during transit. Store it in your backpack, purse, or car to ensure you can repair your glasses as needed.

In addition to eyeglass repair screws, we’ve also included an assortment of watch repair screws in a variety of sizes: winding watch screws and quartz watch screws. With this kit, you can repair both your eyeglasses and watches in one convenient place.
